Ghost Bunker Reference Web Client

Protocol: v0.1 | Client: v0.2.0-alpha
Stores only non-sensitive UI settings locally. Never stores passphrase or message history.
No plaintext frames. Passphrase/key never sent to server. Plaintext <= 4 KB before encryption. Ciphertext <= 16 KB. Emoji and non-ASCII nickname/room_id are rejected before send.
Chat (local-only decrypted view)
Technical log
